- `2026-07-23` · **SN-0003** · _impl_ — All client-side work done on branch `feat/sn-0003-read-query-client`. **Phase 1 - document list server filtering + cursor pagination:** - `client/src/lib/doc-list-params.ts`: `buildDocListParams` maps filter state + cursor to server query params. Tests in `doc-list-params.test.ts` (6 cases). - All 7 document list routes (receipts, purchase orders, sales orders, deliveries, transfers, adjustments, opnames) switched from `useQuery` to `useInfiniteQuery`. Server params wired via `buildDocListParams`; "Muat lebih banyak" load-more button added. - 4 message keys added to `id.json`/`en.json`: `doclist_load_more`, `picker_select_product`, `picker_select_partner`, `picker_select_warehouse`. **Phase 2 - PickerDialog wrapper:** - `client/src/lib/picker-dialog.tsx`: `PickerDialog` renders a trigger button that opens Dialog (desktop) or Sheet (mobile via `useIsMobile`). Tests in `picker-dialog.test.tsx` (4 cases). - `ProductCombobox`, `PartnerCombobox`, `WarehouseCombobox` now render through `PickerDialog`. Trigger shows resolved selected label from local list when no `selectedLabel` prop is passed. Added `selectedLabel?: string` prop to all three. - Existing combobox tests updated to click the trigger before interacting with the input. **Cleanup:** - Dead client-side filter functions removed: `sortReceipts`, `sortPurchaseOrders`, `filterSalesOrders`, `filterDeliveries`, `filterTransferRows` (and their tests). - Misnamed test files without `-` prefix renamed: `deliveries-data.test.ts` → `-deliveries-data.test.ts`, `transfers-data.test.ts` → `-transfers-data.test.ts`. - `test-setup.ts`: added `window.matchMedia` stub for jsdom compatibility with `useIsMobile`. Gate: `pnpm typecheck && pnpm test --run` (203 tests, 33 files) && `pnpm lint` all green.
